purpose: Classify non-main branches so completed Foundation work cannot pile up outside main unnoticed.

routes.reason: The 108-card Foundation branch tip is an ancestor of main after the 2026-05-19 merge.
routes.nextAction: Keep only as historical branch evidence until branch pruning is explicitly approved.

routes.reason: Remote Foundation branch tip is already integrated into main.
routes.nextAction: Keep as remote historical evidence until remote branch pruning is explicitly approved.

routes.reason: Preserves unrelated local-main side commits from before the Foundation merge without silently mixing them into Foundation main.
routes.nextAction: Review and route the preserved side commits under their own card before merging or deleting the branch.

routes.reason: Remote preservation branch mirrors the unrelated local-main side commits from before the Foundation merge.
routes.nextAction: Keep preserved until the side commits are reviewed under their own card.

routes.reason: Local preservation branch for pre-merge side commits; it is intentionally not part of this Foundation green sprint.
routes.nextAction: Review alongside the preserve remote branch and delete only after explicit cleanup approval.

routes.reason: Unfinished marketing video lab WIP branch; it is not claiming completed Foundation sprint work.
routes.nextAction: Leave out of Foundation main integration until a marketing card explicitly resumes or retires it.
